mapper.select: SELECT * FROM R_PAGE_T ORDER BY PAGE_GROUP, SORT_ORDER

SELECT a.USER_ID, a.PAGE_CODE, a.CAN_VIEW, a.CAN_EDIT, a.MODIFY_USER_ID, a.MODIFY_AT, p.PAGE_NAME, p.PAGE_GROUP, p.SORT_ORDER, p.PAGE_PATH FROM R_USER_PAGE_ACCESS_T a JOIN R_PAGE_T p ON a.PAGE_CODE = p.PAGE_CODE WHERE a.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} ORDER BY p.PAGE_GROUP, p.SORT_ORDER

SELECT a.USER_ID, a.PAGE_CODE, a.CAN_VIEW, a.CAN_EDIT, a.MODIFY_USER_ID, a.MODIFY_AT, p.PAGE_NAME, p.PAGE_GROUP, p.SORT_ORDER, p.PAGE_PATH FROM R_USER_PAGE_ACCESS_T a JOIN R_PAGE_T p ON a.PAGE_CODE = p.PAGE_CODE WHERE a.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND a.PAGE_CODE = #{PAGE_CODE}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO R_USER_PAGE_ACCESS_T (USER_ID, PAGE_CODE, CAN_VIEW, CAN_EDIT, MODIFY_USER_ID, MODIFY_AT) VALUES (#{USER_ID}, #{PAGE_CODE}, #{CAN_VIEW}, #{CAN_EDIT}, #{MODIFY_USER_ID}, NOW())

INSERT INTO R_USER_PAGE_ACCESS_T (USER_ID, PAGE_CODE, CAN_VIEW, CAN_EDIT, MODIFY_USER_ID, MODIFY_AT) VALUES
(#{item.USER_ID}, #{item.PAGE_CODE}, #{item.CAN_VIEW}, #{item.CAN_EDIT}, #{item.MODIFY_USER_ID}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE R_USER_PAGE_ACCESS_T SET CAN_VIEW = #{CAN_VIEW}, CAN_EDIT = #{CAN_EDIT}, MODIFY_USER_ID = #{MODIFY_USER_ID}, MODIFY_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND PAGE_CODE = #{PAGE_CODE}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM R_USER_PAGE_ACCESS_T WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND PAGE_CODE = #{PAGE_CODE}
